Lavender features guest rooms with flat-screen TVs and DVD players. Gas fireplaces and mini-refrigerators are also included. Evening turndown service with chocolates is also offered.

Freshly baked cookies and free refreshments are provided daily at Lavender. Bicycles, books and games are available to borrow from the front desk. Concierge services are also featured.

The Napa Valley Wine Train and the Napa Farmers Market are just a short drive from Lavender. The Culinary Institute of America at Greystone is close by.

Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.9 for a two-person trip.

Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a terrace, and complimentary bicycles. Additional amenities include an outdoor fireplace, games room, and barbecue facilities.
Delightful Dining: A continental and Ã  la carte breakfast is served daily, including fresh pastries. Special diet menus are available, and breakfast can be enjoyed in the room.

hotels.description_en:
Located in Napa Valley, this Yountville, California hotel boasts an on-site pool and hot tub. Spa services are available. The on-site restaurant is headed by Chef Nick Tamburo who joins North Block from Manhattanâ€™s Momofuku Ko, bringing a fresh energy to Yountville with his take on refined California cooking featuring locally grown, seasonal ingredients.
The North Block Hotel includes guest rooms with a flat-screen TV, a large soaking tub and heated floors in the bathroom. Each room features a terrace or a patio with a seating area.
The North Block Hotel is nearby French, Italian, Pacific Rim and California restaurants. Area activities include art galleries, museums, antique shops and bike rental facilities.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.9 for a two-person trip.
